title: Early Bird
description: Congratulations on creating your first travel plan!
progress: min(100, (len(trips) / 1) * 100)

title: First Steps
description: The ice is broken, the exploration of the world has begun!
progress: min(100, (len(visited_countries) / 1) * 100)

title: World Explorer
description: You are already considered a seasoned traveler in the world.
progress: min(100, (len(visited_countries) / 10) * 100)

title: Globetrotter
description: 25 countries visited. You're practically living out of a suitcase!
progress: min(100, (len(visited_countries) / 25) * 100)

title: Euro-Traveler
description: The gates of Europe are open before you.
progress: min(100, (len(visited_eu) / 5) * 100)

title: EU Master
description: You are the uncrowned king of the European Union!
progress: min(100, (len(visited_eu) / len(eu_countries) * 100)) if len(eu_countries) > 0 else 0

title: Frequent Flyer
description: You spend more time in the air than on the ground!
progress: min(100, (visited_by_transport.get('plane', 0) / 5) * 100)

title: Sky Captain
description: 15 flights completed. The sky is your second home.
progress: min(100, (visited_by_transport.get('plane', 0) / 15) * 100)

title: Road Warrior
description: Nothing beats a good old road trip.
progress: min(100, (visited_by_transport.get('car', 0) / 5) * 100)

title: Train Enthusiast
description: Loving the rhythm of the rails. 5 train journeys completed.
progress: min(100, (visited_by_transport.get('train', 0) / 5) * 100)

title: Weekend Warrior
description: 5 short trips (less than 4 days) completed.
criteria: len([t for t in trips if t.status == 'visited' and t.start_date and t.end_date and (t.end_date - t.start_date).days < 4]) >= 5
progress: min(100, (len([t for t in trips if t.status == 'visited' and t.start_date and t.end_date and (t.end_date - t.start_date).days < 4]) / 5) * 100)
current: len([t for t in trips if t.status == 'visited' and t.start_date and t.end_date and (t.end_date - t.start_date).days < 4])

title: Long Hauler
description: You've completed a trip longer than 14 days. True nomad!
criteria: any([t for t in trips if t.status == 'visited' and t.start_date and t.end_date and (t.end_date - t.start_date).days >= 14])
progress: 100 if any([t for t in trips if t.status == 'visited' and t.start_date and t.end_date and (t.end_date - t.start_date).days >= 14]) else 0
current: 1 if any([t for t in trips if t.status == 'visited' and t.start_date and t.end_date and (t.end_date - t.start_date).days >= 14]) else 0

title: Early Adopter
description: Created your account in the early days of Nomad Planner.

title: Budget Master
description: Tracked expenses for at least 10 trips.
criteria: len([t for t in trips if t.budget and t.budget > 0]) >= 10
progress: min(100, (len([t for t in trips if t.budget and t.budget > 0]) / 10) * 100)
current: len([t for t in trips if t.budget and t.budget > 0])

title: Checklist Pro
description: Completed all items in a packing list for 5 different trips.
criteria: len([t for t in trips if t.checklist and len(t.checklist) > 0 and all(c.is_done for c in t.checklist)]) >= 5
progress: min(100, (len([t for t in trips if t.checklist and len(t.checklist) > 0 and all(c.is_done for c in t.checklist)]) / 5) * 100)
current: len([t for t in trips if t.checklist and len(t.checklist) > 0 and all(c.is_done for c in t.checklist)])

title: Planner Addict
description: Have at least 15 planned (not yet visited) trips in your account.
criteria: len([t for t in trips if t.status == 'planned']) >= 15
progress: min(100, (len([t for t in trips if t.status == 'planned']) / 15) * 100)
current: len([t for t in trips if t.status == 'planned'])

title: Social Butterfly
description: Created and shared 5 public travel links.
progress: min(100, (share_count / 5) * 100)

title: Share Ambassador
description: Created 10 shared travel links.
progress: min(100, (share_count / 10) * 100)

title: Visa Navigator
description: Completed 5 trips where a visa was required.
criteria: len([t for t in visited_trips if t.visa_required]) >= 5
progress: min(100, (len([t for t in visited_trips if t.visa_required]) / 5) * 100)
current: len([t for t in visited_trips if t.visa_required])

title: Cartographer
description: Logged map coordinates for 10 visited trips.
criteria: len([t for t in visited_trips if t.latitude is not None and t.longitude is not None]) >= 10
progress: min(100, (len([t for t in visited_trips if t.latitude is not None and t.longitude is not None]) / 10) * 100)
current: len([t for t in visited_trips if t.latitude is not None and t.longitude is not None])

title: Itinerary Architect
description: Added detailed attractions to 12 trips.
criteria: len([t for t in trips if t.attractions and t.attractions.strip()]) >= 12
progress: min(100, (len([t for t in trips if t.attractions and t.attractions.strip()]) / 12) * 100)
current: len([t for t in trips if t.attractions and t.attractions.strip()])

title: Multi-modal Master
description: Used at least 4 different transport modes on visited trips.
progress: min(100, (len(set(visited_transport_modes)) / 4) * 100)

title: Season Hopper
description: Completed visited trips in all four seasons.
criteria: len(set([((t.start_date.month - 1) // 3) for t in visited_trips if t.start_date])) >= 4
progress: min(100, (len(set([((t.start_date.month - 1) // 3) for t in visited_trips if t.start_date])) / 4) * 100)
current: len(set([((t.start_date.month - 1) // 3) for t in visited_trips if t.start_date]))

title: Year Rounder
description: Visited trips across at least 3 different years.
criteria: len(set([t.start_date.year for t in visited_trips if t.start_date])) >= 3
progress: min(100, (len(set([t.start_date.year for t in visited_trips if t.start_date])) / 3) * 100)
current: len(set([t.start_date.year for t in visited_trips if t.start_date]))

title: Journey Marathon
description: Completed 10 long trips (7+ days each).
criteria: len([t for t in visited_trips if t.start_date and t.end_date and (t.end_date - t.start_date).days >= 7]) >= 10
progress: min(100, (len([t for t in visited_trips if t.start_date and t.end_date and (t.end_date - t.start_date).days >= 7]) / 10) * 100)
current: len([t for t in visited_trips if t.start_date and t.end_date and (t.end_date - t.start_date).days >= 7])

title: Continent Collector
description: Visited at least 3 different world regions.
criteria: len([region for region in [visited_africa, visited_asia, visited_americas, visited_oceania] if len(region) > 0]) >= 3
progress: min(100, (len([region for region in [visited_africa, visited_asia, visited_americas, visited_oceania] if len(region) > 0]) / 3) * 100)
current: len([region for region in [visited_africa, visited_asia, visited_americas, visited_oceania] if len(region) > 0])

title: Continent Conqueror
description: Visited countries in all tracked world regions.
criteria: len([region for region in [visited_africa, visited_asia, visited_americas, visited_oceania] if len(region) > 0]) >= 4
progress: min(100, (len([region for region in [visited_africa, visited_asia, visited_americas, visited_oceania] if len(region) > 0]) / 4) * 100)
current: len([region for region in [visited_africa, visited_asia, visited_americas, visited_oceania] if len(region) > 0])

title: Bus Explorer
description: Completed 5 visited trips by bus.
progress: min(100, (visited_by_transport.get('bus', 0) / 5) * 100)

title: Ferry Rider
description: Completed 3 visited trips by ferry.
progress: min(100, (visited_by_transport.get('ferry', 0) / 3) * 100)

title: Draft Strategist
description: Built up 10 draft trip ideas.
criteria: len([t for t in trips if t.status == 'draft']) >= 10
progress: min(100, (len([t for t in trips if t.status == 'draft']) / 10) * 100)
current: len([t for t in trips if t.status == 'draft'])

title: Destination Curator
description: Saved 20 trips with clear destination and country data.
criteria: len([t for t in trips if t.destination and t.country]) >= 20
progress: min(100, (len([t for t in trips if t.destination and t.country]) / 20) * 100)
current: len([t for t in trips if t.destination and t.country])

title: Checklist Commander
description: Fully completed checklists for 12 different trips.
criteria: len([t for t in trips if t.checklist and len(t.checklist) > 0 and all(c.is_done for c in t.checklist)]) >= 12
progress: min(100, (len([t for t in trips if t.checklist and len(t.checklist) > 0 and all(c.is_done for c in t.checklist)]) / 12) * 100)
current: len([t for t in trips if t.checklist and len(t.checklist) > 0 and all(c.is_done for c in t.checklist)])

title: Map Archivist
description: Saved map coordinates on 20 trips.
criteria: len([t for t in trips if t.latitude is not None and t.longitude is not None]) >= 20
progress: min(100, (len([t for t in trips if t.latitude is not None and t.longitude is not None]) / 20) * 100)
current: len([t for t in trips if t.latitude is not None and t.longitude is not None])

title: Consistent Traveler
description: Completed at least one visited trip in 5 different years.
criteria: len(set([t.start_date.year for t in visited_trips if t.start_date])) >= 5
progress: min(100, (len(set([t.start_date.year for t in visited_trips if t.start_date])) / 5) * 100)
current: len(set([t.start_date.year for t in visited_trips if t.start_date]))

title: Monthly Momentum
description: Visited trips in at least 8 different months of the year.
criteria: len(set([t.start_date.month for t in visited_trips if t.start_date])) >= 8
progress: min(100, (len(set([t.start_date.month for t in visited_trips if t.start_date])) / 8) * 100)
current: len(set([t.start_date.month for t in visited_trips if t.start_date]))

title: Africa Explorer
description: Visited 3 different countries in Africa.
progress: min(100, (len(visited_africa) / 3) * 100)

title: Asia Adventurer
description: Visited 5 different countries in Asia.
progress: min(100, (len(visited_asia) / 5) * 100)

title: America Voyager
description: Visited 5 different countries across the Americas.
progress: min(100, (len(visited_americas) / 5) * 100)

title: Oceania Discoverer
description: Visited 3 different countries in Oceania.
progress: min(100, (len(visited_oceania) / 3) * 100)

title: Discovery of America
description: Visited both the United States and Canada.
progress: 100 if {'United States', 'Canada'}.issubset(visited_countries) else (50 if ('United States' in visited_countries or 'Canada' in visited_countries) else 0)

title: Latino Traveler
description: Visited 3 different countries in South or Central America.
progress: min(100, (len(visited_americas - {'United States', 'Canada'}) / 3) * 100)

title: Nomad Legend
description: Completed 50 trips in total. You are a legend!
criteria: len([t for t in trips if t.status == 'visited']) >= 50
progress: min(100, (len([t for t in trips if t.status == 'visited']) / 50) * 100)
current: len([t for t in trips if t.status == 'visited'])

title: Night Owl
description: Logged into the app 5 times between midnight and 4 AM.
